Gg boys.

item.title: For Me to Laugh at Later 37
item.description:
I have no idea what this is referencing, but its so random I love it.
I like to think the dragon is wondering why this girl is wearing her skirt backwards.
Use your 1st amendment rights people.
I have a lot of questions.
I have seen/heard a lot of weird opinions last few years, but this is the weirdest.
Should be a gator holding a gun.
item.dc:creator: WHOOPER13

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Life: "But Wait! There's MORE!"
item.description:
started 2 months ago, been putting away $200 per paycheck for a down payment eventually. Have about a grand socked away. Been rehabbing the credit since the divorce, up to about 680 now.
Sprained his wrist doing 190 lb. (86kg) deadlifts last Friday. How the fsck do you sprain your wrist doing deadlifts? Then car check engine light came on. P0014 and P0017 codes come back. Replaced the Exhaust Oil Control Valve. That cleared the P0014. Swapped the timing sensor, that didn't clear the P0017. Local shop won't do it, recommends the dealership. Take it there, they say it's the timing chain assembly. About $3k for that. So, it's been a $5k week. Gonna pull money from the 401k to pay for it all, because don't have nearly that much in savings. Just a scream into the benthosphere.
Apparently, when you replace the timing chain, you have to replace everything else? *sigh* But, the car as 140k on it, 50k of which are tiny octopus', so it is past time for the recommended swapping. just. ugh. lol. So, how y'all doin?
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus

item.title: Cheetara Body Paint - MCroft07
item.description: I saw that some of my videos were being posted on here without credit so thought I might as well post it myself ?? A lot of people on instagram liked my Cheetara and the community here have been really supportive of my paintings so I thought it would be nice to share :) Painted using a mirror (and brushes). Also the stick is literally a mop handle I unscrewed and spray painted gold, hahaha If you wanted to follow me on social media, I'm Mcroft07 on IG, twitter, tiktok (everywhere) and I paint these live on Twitch.tv/mcroft07
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: 15 years ago I promised to see all the things with one person. Today we checked NYC off that card. MD-NY
item.dc:creator: DirtyLitterBoxes

item.title: Rocky Raccoon
item.dc:creator: kickarr

item.title: POV: my ex husband
item.description: Just a rant into the void from a girl with horrible boundaries. I left my ex last August after 10 years together. Through that time I supported him through mental illness and instability. Things were never stable, but I did care for this person. My life was always focused on him and catering to his mental illness, and even when it got abusive I still stayed. I sacrificed a lot to him, lost years to his addiction, and supported him by working full time and also caring for our kid. I lived with paranoia, controlling behavior, addiction, suicidality, and instability. We tried so many times to work together with a couples therapist, but every time I tried to confront him about his cannabis use it would devolve into a horrible mess. I dealt with a lot of pain. He held me back, but I loved him. I was scared to lose him so I did everything I could to keep him alive even though he verbally and emotionally abused me. But it was too much and I left with our kid last year, filed for divorce just a few weeks later. It was a slow burnout, and both of us have guilt in it. But I was the one being abused, and he couldn't handle me taking control of my own life and my own destiny. I wasn't attracted to him. I was more afraid, and stayed out of fear. But with a lot of support from friends and family I finally got out. I have had court enforced custody of our kid for the last 5. I have done everything for my kid, including keeping him in his school even though it involved a 45 minute commute every morning and evening. Fast forward to today! I finally have an apartment after staying with my parents for the last 7 months. We have been working with the same therapist on co-parenting and things have been better. We are finally communicating better than ever. But I suck at my own boundaries. He wants us to be close friends, and I want to cheer him on. He is stable, sober, sticking to his meds and treatment. Even with some rather strict expectations, we are working on getting him and our kid back together. He offered me the queen bed for our new place, saying he never used it and prefers to sleep on his couch. So yeah, I will gladly take it and save a few hundred $ on a new bed. My kid is 7 and we already share a queen here, we are close and I don't mind. I just want a safe place closer to his school and my school so we don't have to drive so much and so I can actually have my independence and see my friends. I also offered to have a visit with them over spring break. We'll hopefully get the bed tomorrow. But tonight we went to check it out, and to give them a visit. Our weekly session on Wednesday must have given him some ideas, because I talked about how hard it was to be together at our kids school music show last week. I was also exhausted from horrible sleep the night before (and over the last month with my own depression really kicking my ass again). It was nice to be together there, but it made me really sad. We tried and failed to figure this out for so long, so why do I feel guilty for not wanting to try again? But anyway, tonight he was asking me about Wednesday since he cut it short. He says he still loves me and will do anything to get my trust back, he just wants us all under the same roof again. Parts of me agree, but as I told my friends too, it makes me feel gross to hear that. We were moving forward, he had "strong feelings" for his new distance person. I'm not trying to lead him on. I want my life without him! I don't want to try, even for our kid. And I don't want him to fall off and destabilize, because that was one of the ways he controlled me and kept me there for so long. But I have to be honest with him and know that my wants and desires are just as valid and that I can't take responsibility for his actions/reactions. It's just frustrating, but I will have to be a big girl and let him down. I can't give into my own fears about future partners because I have my own hang-ups about my (trans) body and just go back. My own therapist reminded me that yes, he may be familiar with my body but he was also its biggest critic and has used my dysphoria as fodder for his emotional abuse. I'm glad I have good friends and a good therapist to help remind me of these things. TLDR gotta be honest with my ex, I don't want to try and work things out. Even though there are residual feelings, I put in too much effort already with no results. I gotta put me and my kid first. Things will get better. I'm stronger. I still care because I can't bring myself to be "mean", but it would be meaner to compromise my own self for his sake.
item.dc:creator: Losingit3000
